name: Law of the Wilderness
visual_description: A sprawling wilderness reclaiming a crumbling city, vines and roots tearing through stone structures. Massive earthen-toned dinosaurs—a horned ceratopsian and sleek raptor—stride through the ruins. Glowing green energy radiates from the ground, dissolving the last remnants of civilization into dust and shadow.
full_prompt: A sprawling wilderness reclaiming a crumbling city, vines and roots tearing through stone structures. Massive earthen-toned dinosaurs—a horned ceratopsian and sleek raptor—stride through the ruins. Glowing green energy radiates from the ground, dissolving the last remnants of civilization into dust and shadow.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
